title: symphyotrichum puniceum var. calderi
intro: Symphyotrichum puniceum var. calderi, also known as prairie fire or a subspecies of the prairie fireflower, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum puniceum var. calderi include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, burns, and skin conditions.
